name: emmy-planning-context
description: Ambient Emmy Goals Space context loading, approved planning ingestion, authorized Planning Log appends, and approval-gated FFS Jira ticketing.

interface.shortDescription: Use Emmy goals to ground planning.
interface.longDescription: Adds Confluence-backed workflows for loading current Emmy strategic principles, active delivery goals, outcomes, ingesting approved planning principles and goals from text or local files, appending approved Planning Log entries, and drafting or creating FFS Jira tickets after explicit approval.
defaultPrompt: Ground this Emmy planning task in current goals.
Ingest these Emmy principles and goals.
Append the approved Emmy planning log entry.
Draft an FFS Jira ticket following Emmy conventions.
